subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath taught the Most Exalted Pen that whereby the realities of all things were drawn forth, and caused it to speak in remembrance of Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی علم القلم الاعلی ما انجذبت به حقائق الاشیاء و انطقه بذکره و
